setup_svix = ('app_3DmQNt0Ui1fLIXa54fexC5Y54zV', 'msg_3DmQNvdBNgmLHZm19cDCyERTpPT')

    def test_script_execution(setup_svix):
        app_id, msg_id = setup_svix
    
        # Wait for the webhook to be attempted (Svix indexing is eventually consistent)
        import time
        time.sleep(10)
    
        # Run the user's script
        result = subprocess.run(
            ["node", "index.js", app_id, msg_id],
            cwd=PROJECT_DIR,
            capture_output=True,
            text=True
        )
